name: Parameter inference tolerates a perturbed/moved-window demo (§5.5 position-shift axis, offline, no LLM)
description: First perturbed-UI-axis regression scenario for §5.5's remaining checklist item (docs/new/csimple-agent-prompt.md §5.5: 'Add at least one perturbed-UI scenario per generalization axis — position shift, label rename, timing variance'). Exercises POST /api/skill/infer-params end-to-end (real in-process Express server, eval/http-app.js) with two demonstrations of the SAME task where the second demo's click lands at different pixel coordinates — simulating the target window having moved between recordings — while the typed text also varies between demos. Asserts recorder/infer-params.js's designed behavior: pixel x/y are positional/non-semantic and are NEVER promoted to a ${param.x} placeholder even though they vary (so a moved window doesn't silently bake in stale coordinates), while the semantically-varying typed text IS correctly promoted to ${param.text}.
